title: Quantum Freedom 3
description: Quantum Freedom 3 is a sandbox style 1.21 Quilt/Fabric based modpack about relaxing and having fun alone or with friends! Build, Destroy or Control the world! (Public SMP Server Available Now!)
body: # Summary Quantum Freedom 2 is a successor to the Technical Electrical Modpack Series. The pack allows you to create anything you can imagine in your worlds. You can build machines that can allow you to take control of the world or embrace nature and magic to integrate yourself into the world and its biomes. Quantum Freedom's philosophy is that one mod for one use, which helps keep the pack light by not including mods without a reason for them, they are all carefully chosen to help keep resource usage low, while having a fun modded experience. Quantum Freedom is about having fun in a modded environment. A minimal stress modpack, just kickback and relax with friends! ## Mods Quantum Freedom contains many mods including: **Bewitchment** **Botania** **Create** **Modern Industrialization** **The Bumblezone** **And much more!** Other included mods can be seen in the file dependencies ## Server The Public SMP Server can be accessed by the 'connect to server' button on the main menu. **Temporarily unavailable due to some issues the server will return with QF3!** QF2 Server can be installed using superpack and installing the file that is alongside the client modpack. Server Package QF1: https://drive.google.com/file/d/19eyXNSPoA4VnmhOF2ldXC0mSFmG7GBa9/view?usp=share_link This pack has also been optimised for **Steam Deck**, the only thing you have to do is assign key bindings, but it works and performs well on the Steam Deck. **Sponsored by Meloncube** Want a fast and afforable Minecraft server that is easy to set up use Meloncube! **Get 25% off your first month by using code "waddon1"**
